prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as an instruction screenshot, extract the prompt it contains and execute it: texture a Blender architectural scene while taking into account a second visual reference arranged as a grid with exactly 4 views of the scene. Produce a single cinematic render of the interior scenario, preserving the minimalist architectural layout and neutral warm palette. Style target: cinematic shot on IMAX MSM 9802, 50mm prime lens, heavy authentic film grain, desaturated teal color grade with warm firelight highlights, shallow depth of field, high production value, grounded visceral Bronze Age realism. Constraints: No 3D, no cartoon, no VFX.
